query: DELETE FROM paperEquitySnapshots WHERE userId = 1; DELETE FROM paperTrades WHERE userId = 1; UPDATE paperPositions SET status = 'closed', closedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'open'; UPDATE paperLedger SET availableCash = 100000, initialCapital = 100000, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = 1;
